title: Omni-Triplets Action Datapack
description: Omnitrix minecraft datapack based on the youtube series of the same name.
body:
#
Video documenting SOME of the changes made in this update:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/UGsDkUC1NdU" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
#

OT Action is an action-oriented datapack for 1.20.1. It contains 25 + unique aliens, plenty of destructive abilities and enemies to fight, and dedicated playstyles themed around the main characters of the youtube series of the same name.


Upon reloading, the player will be prompted with a few options, including a character select that can be used to skip obtaining the Omnitrixes, which are operated by scrolling to the 9th slot, and right clicking to select a form. Enemies will occasionally spawn by corrupting certain nearby mobs, but a few can only be summoned through crafting special summoning items. Players can dodge, block, select their current ability, and use the ability when in alien form.

Season 2 version 4.0 includes:

-A Few weapons dropped by enemies like Cynthia and the Hallow King

-9 aliens for each of the triplets

-4 Fusions

-3 Optimals

-Vehicle forms for all of Kate's transformations

-Over 33 enemies including Necromorphs and Vazdoriz!

-A team system that uses scores, allowing for player vs. player; so long as no two team scores are the same

-Secret boss fight, throw a withered rose, echo shard, ender eye, and redstone torch together to access it.

-Death Hints

-Quick Change (Level 5 or Higher)

-Master Control

-The player's level is now displayed next to their username on the tab list-Made mob behavior more stable, and improved how they attack in groups, along with how they detect player death

-Throwing rings as Sacchurne no longer requires Stamina to use the ability, it will change your model, if you have no rings, you will not be able to

-Added particular slot storage for the s2 omnitrixes, like if you select Diamondhead, it'll stay on it if you open it again

-if you carry an entity as cannonbolt then try to drop them while sprinting, said entity will be launched

-Heatblast's double jump now activates by double jumping, his traversal move is now flight-Blocking and Dodging are now on separate buttons again

-As a human, if you sneak and look down, you can pick up a rock. Alternatively, press F while holding a rock-like item (like cobblestone) to throw it fast-You can also sneak while sprinting as a human to slide away

-All of S2's text is now translatable

-Made Running on Water a bit better

-Changed Cannonbolt's code a bit

-XLR8 Rework

-Inverse Selection, allowing you to access s1 aliens, drive a motorbike, decouple your Omnitrix, and more!

-Random Select your aliens

-Bug fixes and tweaks

-When crafting the Omnitrix, it crashes out from the sky now.

-A few lore documents
#

And so, so much more

Please report any bugs you find, and thank you for the support :)
